framework.name: WiFi Security Recommendations
framework.name_nl: Recommandations de securite relatives aux reseaux WiFi
framework.issuing_body: Agence nationale de la securite des systemes d'information (ANSSI)
framework.scope: Security recommendations for deploying and managing WiFi networks in enterprise environments
framework.structure_description: Recommendations covering WiFi protocol selection, authentication, encryption, segmentation, monitoring, and rogue AP detection.

controls.title: Use WPA3 or WPA2-Enterprise
controls.description: Deploy WPA3-Enterprise or WPA2-Enterprise with 802.1X authentication. Do not use WPA-Personal in corporate settings.
controls.description_nl: Deployer WPA3-Enterprise ou WPA2-Enterprise avec authentification 802.1X. Ne pas utiliser WPA-Personal en entreprise.

controls.title: Disable WEP and WPA1
controls.description: Disable WEP and WPA (TKIP) as they are cryptographically broken and provide no real security.
controls.description_nl: Desactiver WEP et WPA (TKIP) car ils sont cryptographiquement casses et ne fournissent aucune securite reelle.

controls.title: 802.1X authentication with RADIUS
controls.description: Use 802.1X (EAP-TLS preferred) with a RADIUS server for enterprise WiFi authentication.
controls.description_nl: Utiliser 802.1X (EAP-TLS de preference) avec un serveur RADIUS pour l'authentification WiFi d'entreprise.

controls.title: Certificate-based WiFi authentication
controls.description: For sensitive environments, use certificate-based authentication (EAP-TLS) rather than password-based (PEAP/MSCHAPv2).
controls.description_nl: Pour les environnements sensibles, utiliser l'authentification par certificat (EAP-TLS) plutot que par mot de passe (PEAP/MSCHAPv2).

controls.title: WiFi network segmentation
controls.description: Place WiFi networks on dedicated VLANs segmented from wired internal networks. Apply firewall rules between segments.
controls.description_nl: Placer les reseaux WiFi sur des VLAN dedies segmentes des reseaux internes filaires. Appliquer des regles de pare-feu entre les segments.

controls.title: Guest WiFi isolation
controls.description: Guest WiFi shall provide internet access only, fully isolated from internal networks with captive portal authentication.
controls.description_nl: Le WiFi invites ne doit fournir qu'un acces internet, entierement isole des reseaux internes avec authentification par portail captif.

controls.title: Rogue access point detection
controls.title_nl: Detection des points d'acces non autorises
controls.description: Deploy wireless intrusion detection/prevention (WIDS/WIPS) to detect rogue access points and deauthentication attacks.
controls.description_nl: Deployer la detection/prevention d'intrusion sans fil (WIDS/WIPS) pour detecter les points d'acces non autorises et les attaques de desauthentification.

controls.title: WiFi access point hardening
controls.description: Change default credentials on all APs, disable management interfaces on user-facing networks, keep firmware updated.
controls.description_nl: Changer les identifiants par defaut sur tous les AP, desactiver les interfaces de gestion sur les reseaux utilisateurs, maintenir le micrologiciel a jour.

controls.title: Disable WiFi when not needed
controls.title_nl: Desactiver le WiFi lorsque non necessaire
controls.description: In highly sensitive environments, prefer wired connections and disable WiFi interfaces when not required.
controls.description_nl: Dans les environnements hautement sensibles, privilegier les connexions filaires et desactiver les interfaces WiFi lorsque non necessaires.

controls.title: WiFi usage logging
controls.description: Log WiFi authentication events, association/disassociation, and bandwidth anomalies for security monitoring.
controls.description_nl: Journaliser les evenements d'authentification WiFi, les associations/desassociations et les anomalies de bande passante pour la surveillance de securite.
